name: Number 69: Heraldry Crest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>６９ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>紋章神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゴッド・メダリオン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>コート・オブ・アームズ
name_jp_rom: Nanbāzu Rokujūkyū Goddo Medarion Kōto Obu Āmuzu
name_jp_rom_base: Nanbāzu Rokujūkyū Monshōshin Kōto Obu Āmuzu
name_jp_tl: Numbers 69: God Medallion Coat of Arms
name_jp_tl_base: No.69: Heraldic God Coat of Arms
desc:
3 Level 4 monsters
If this card is Special Summoned: Negate the effects of all other Xyz Monsters currently on the field. You can target 1 other face-up Xyz Monster on the field; until the End Phase, this card's name becomes that monster's original name, also replace this effect with that monster's original effects. You can only use this effect of "Number 69: Heraldry Crest" once per turn.

stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
